title: Unify voiceDock labels to single Prestix assistant identity
completion_summary: Unified voiceDock labels to single Prestix identity. All 53 interpreter tests pass (0 regressions).

context_files.reason: Current voiceDock structure and assistant-first unify requirements

acceptance_criteria: VoiceDockMode type reduced to single value or mode parameter repurposed
getVoiceDockCopy() returns unified labels regardless of mode: headline 'Talk to Prestix', placeholder 'Speak or type...', submitLabel 'Send'
Default micButtonLabel is 'talk handsfree' (no more 'translate handsfree' split)
All mic state variants (permission, recording, transcribing) still work
voiceDock.test.ts updated to match new unified expectations
All other existing tests still pass
